# Joy Junk Removal

> Joy Junk Removal is a local, family-owned junk removal and hauling service in San Luis Obispo County, California. We offer fast, friendly pickups with upfront pricing and no hidden fees — furniture removal, home and estate cleanouts, appliance and electronics hauling, construction debris, yard waste, and more. Licensed and insured. Same-day service when available. Call or text (805) 424-5727.

## Service Area
San Luis Obispo County, California — including San Luis Obispo, Paso Robles, Atascadero, Arroyo Grande, Pismo Beach, Morro Bay, Nipomo, Templeton, Los Osos, and Grover Beach.

## Key Pages
- [Home](https://joyjunkremoval.com/): Overview, free quote form, how it works, and FAQ.
- [Services](https://joyjunkremoval.com/services.html): Full list of junk removal and hauling services.
- [About](https://joyjunkremoval.com/about.html): Company story and values.

## Contact
- Phone & text: (805) 424-5727
- Email: hello@joyjunkremoval.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 7 AM – 7 PM
- Pricing: Upfront, per-job quotes with no hidden fees. Free estimates.
